name: Clumsiness of Cowards
timing: Play during the Activation Step, before or after any action.
description: Target character who is within 10" of their starting table edge loses possession of all Moonstones they are carrying and gains [**Weakling**: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.] until end of turn.
extraDescription: Place dropped Moonstones in base contact with the model with a depth value of '1'.
